title: Palicourea zevallosii
taxonomy: Palicourea zevallosii is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Palicourea, which is a group of flowering plants. The plant's classification includes being a member of the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. Furthermore, it is a part of the kingdom Plantae. Its classification reflects its relationship to other flowering plants within the plant kingdom.
uses: Palicourea zevallosii is a plant species native to Peru, and its medicinal uses are primarily based on traditional knowledge.
